add_executable(DearThemeLab
    main.cpp
    App.cpp
    PreviewPanel.cpp
    Showcase.cpp
    EditorPanel.cpp
    Exporter.cpp
)

# Embed Inter-Regular.ttf as a C byte array so the font is baked into the
# binary — no external file dependency at runtime.
file(READ "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/assets/fonts/Inter-Regular.ttf" INTER_FONT_HEX HEX)
string(REGEX REPLACE "([0-9a-f][0-9a-f])" "0x\\1," INTER_FONT_HEX "${INTER_FONT_HEX}")
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/InterFont.h"
    "// Auto-generated by CMake — do not edit\n"
    "static const unsigned char g_InterRegular_ttf[] = {${INTER_FONT_HEX}};\n"
    "static const unsigned int  g_InterRegular_ttf_size = sizeof(g_InterRegular_ttf);\n"
)
target_include_directories(DearThemeLab PRIVATE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}")

if(APPLE)
    target_compile_definitions(DearThemeLab PRIVATE GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION)
endif()

target_link_libraries(DearThemeLab PRIVATE imgui nfd::nfd)
